description_long: This sculpture depicts a draped human figure standing upright on a rectangular plinth. The figure appears to be female, with classical Greco-Roman styling, including a long, flowing garment that wraps around the body and falls in naturalistic folds. The head is adorned with a subtle headpiece or hair arrangement, and the arms are bent at the elbows, with one hand resting on the opposite forearm. The facial features are softly rendered, and the overall posture is calm and contemplative. The surface of the sculpture is smooth and dark, suggesting it is made of bronze or a similar metal. The base is simple and solid, providing stability and a sense of permanence.
description: A dark, smooth classical-style sculpture of a draped human figure standing on a rectangular plinth, with arms gently crossed and a contemplative posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full frontal details of the draped figure, including the face, crossed arms, and the flowing garment.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the profile of the head, the drapery's side folds, and the arm positioning.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the draped garment cascading down the back, and the solid plinth.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the opposite profile, the curvature of the back, and the way the arms are held.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
